géométrie wilayas

Source: R/data.R
sig.w.Rd

Look up sig.w.

Usage

sig.w

Format

Data frame with 03 columns and 48 rows

CC_1

code wilaya.

NAME_1

nom wilaya.

geometry

geometry.

Source

DSP Djelfa

Examples

  sig.w
#> Error in `[<-`(`*tmp*`, unname, value = list(CC_1 = structure(c(1L, 39L, 41L, 8L, 16L, 44L, 47L, 45L, 46L, 48L, 28L, 2L, 29L, 12L, 18L, 9L, 26L, 33L, 30L, 42L, 17L, 27L, 10L, 35L, 23L, 21L, 22L,
